port_metadata.vessel_dimension_note: While length is recorded as per Lloyd's Register, Panama tariffs are predominantly hourly-based per area rather than bracketed by LOA.

tariff_a_port_towing.additional_time_logic: $1,957 per additional hour, prorated every 15 minutes
$1,957 per additional hour, prorated every 15 minutes
$1,957 per additional hour, prorated every 15 minutes

shifting.description: Shifting of ships within port areas
shifting.calculation_logic: Charged as one undocking plus one docking

fuel_bunker_surcharge.reference_source: Panamá’s Secretaría de Energía (Precio de Paridad)
fuel_bunker_surcharge.example_calculation: If price is $3.0/gal, surcharge is $200 per tug per maneuver

dead_ship_surcharge.applicability: All rates except waiting and fog
dead_ship_surcharge.condition: Assistance of dead ships (no own propulsion/steerage)

time_counting.start: Time the tug leaves its station
time_counting.end: Time the tug has returned to its station

exclusions: Tariff rates do not apply in case of drift-ice
Does not apply to vessels broken loose from moorings
Does not apply to assistance outside mentioned areas
Does not apply to emergency or salvage services
calculation_logic_subtext.governing_conditions: UK Standard Conditions For Towage And Other Services (Revised 1986)
